mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recordings (recording_id, user_id, s3_bucket, s3_key, language_code, original_filename, content_type, status, created_at) VALUES (#{recordingId}, #{userId}, #{s3Bucket}, #{s3Key}, #{languageCode}, #{originalFilename}, #{contentType}, #{status}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, recording_id, user_id, s3_bucket, s3_key, language_code, original_filename, content_type, status, created_at FROM recordings WHERE recording_id = #{recordingId}
SELECT id, recording_id, user_id, s3_bucket, s3_key, language_code, original_filename, content_type, status, created_at FROM recordings WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
